# Modulo Operation

Modulo operator for remainder calculation

```perl
$remainder = $dividend % $divisor;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$remainder = $dividend % $divisor;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$remainder = $dividend % $divisor;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
